'''Nasta''' was a [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoid]] in charge of the local underground on [[Mrlsst/Legends|Mrlsst]], during the early years of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. A gawky, bird-like being with dark brown skin and pronounced eye-sockets, he helped [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] uncover [[Loka Hask]]'s plans by using the surveillance cameras in the [[Mrlsst Trade and Science Academy]] to view Hask's strategy meetings.

==Appearances==
*[[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 7|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 7]] {{1st}}
